description: Versioned capability bundle for Roslyn source generator setup, implementation, testing, packaging, and CI guidance.

notes: Install all listed files together so the agent, instruction, and skill stay aligned.
Keep referenced skill documents with the main skill file.

contents.description: Role-oriented specialist for source generator lifecycle work.
Durable implementation rules for Roslyn generator work.
Entry-point skill for source generation tasks.
Project structure and local consumer wiring reference.
Testing, CI, and packaging validation reference.

notes: Designed for repositories that keep reusable customization assets under .agents.
The bundle is neutral metadata and does not depend on one client-specific plugin runtime.
